context: Documentation site transitioning to a 2D top-down hydroponic simulation game

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Bento grid structure for documentation panels to separate diagram view from state tables.

sidebar.style: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-72 bg-white border-r border-[#D1FAE5] p-6 overflow-y-auto z-40
sidebar.active_link: bg-[#E0F2FE] text-[#0284C7] font-semibold rounded-xl px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3
sidebar.inactive_link: text-[#4B5563] hover:bg-[#F4F9F4] hover:text-[#064E3B] font-medium rounded-xl px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3 transition-colors

fsm_viewer_card.style: bg-white border border-[#D1FAE5] rounded-2xl shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col h-[600px]
fsm_viewer_card.description: The background pattern hints at the 2D top-down grid of the upcoming game.

data_table.container: bg-white border border-[#D1FAE5] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm
data_table.header: bg-[#F4F9F4] text-[#064E3B] font-semibold text-left p-4 border-b border-[#D1FAE5]

button.primary: bg-[#10B981] hover:bg-[#059669] text-white px-6 py-3 rounded-xl transition-all shadow-sm active:translate-y-[1px] font-semibold inline-flex items-center gap-2
button.outline: border-2 border-[#10B981] text-[#10B981] hover:bg-[#F4F9F4] px-6 py-3 rounded-xl transition-all font-semibold inline-flex items-center gap-2

icons.usage: Use icons for the 13 navigation links (e.g., Leaf for seeding, Droplet for watering, Tool for repairing). Use Download icon for the drawio download button.

image_urls.description: White tower with hydroponic plants. Use heavily faded or as a masked overlay in the welcome/empty state to introduce the farming theme.
Two men examining a plant. Great for the onboarding modal or documentation introduction page.
Greenhouse with green plants. Useful for decorative banners or footer background.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a modern documentation layout: Fixed Sidebar on the left (w-72) and a Main Content area on the right (ml-72).
UI LANGUAGE MUST BE BAHASA INDONESIA. Example translations: 'Unduh .drawio' (Download .drawio), 'Tabel Status' (State Table), 'Aksi' (Events), 'Transisi' (Transitions).

Implement the 13 FSM categories in the sidebar navigation: Pembelian Bibit, Penyemaian, Penyiraman, Pemberian Nutrisi, Perbaikan Alat, Panen & Jual, Siklus Hidup Tanaman, Status Pemain, Status Peralatan, Ekonomi & Pasar, Sistem Cuaca, Keseimbangan pH & Air, Siklus Siang/Malam.

Main Area Layout (Bento Grid Mode B): Top section is a large header with title and 'Unduh .drawio' button. Middle is the FSM Diagram Viewer Card (h-[600px] with CSS grid background). Bottom section contains 3 data tables (Status, Event, Transisi) mapped nicely in a CSS grid (grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-6).
FSM Viewer Background: Use the custom background pattern provided in `fsm_viewer_card.background_pattern` to create a 2D top-down grid look, hinting at the simulation game.
Data State: Because there is no DB, use Local Storage or static JSON to hold the FSM data definitions and diagram URLs/state for the 13 categories.

Styling: Override the Shadcn default colors in `index.css` to match the Organic & Earthy archetype (Greens and Off-Whites). Do not use default Vercel-look. Remove sharp card borders and prefer rounded-2xl.
Testing: Add `data-testid` to ALL interactive elements. e.g., `data-testid="nav-penyiraman"`, `data-testid="btn-download-drawio"`.
Install Google Fonts (Outfit, Manrope, JetBrains Mono) via index.html or index.css imports.
Use `lucide-react` for all icons. Ensure icons are present for each FSM category in the sidebar.
